_comment: Human-in-the-loop overrides applied LAST by nutrition_engine.py (keyed by recipe id). Use for recipes the engine gets wrong that aren't worth a general rule. `servings` rescales all per-serving figures from the total; `per_serving` sets specific fields. Keep this small and reasoned.

million-dollar-deviled-eggs.note: finger food — 12 deviled-egg halves, not weight-based main portions

pork-and-shrimp-siu-mai-steamed-chinese-.note: dumplings — a batch serves ~6, not 1 weight-based 'main'

easy-pull-apart-pepperoni-garlic-knots.note: appetizer bread — ~8 knots, not 2 weight-based mains
